tool.name: MGnify: Generate Reverse Complements of reverse Primers
tool.description: reverse-complement sequences for reverse primer entries (identified by 'R')
tool.help:
**Generate Reverse Complements of reverse Primers** ---------------------------------------------------
This tool generates **reverse-complement sequences** for primer entries (**labeled with 'R'**) in a FASTA file. Forward primers (e.g., labeled with 'F') are left unchanged.
**Example**
Input FASTA file::
>341F CCTACGGGNGGCWGCAG >805R GACTACHVGGGTATCTAATCC
Output FASTA file::
>341F CCTACGGGNGGCWGCAG >805R GGATTAGATACCCBDGTAGTC
